title: GuardrailUpdater
content:
# GuardrailUpdater

Optional limits for absolute minimum and maximum values.
This is defined using the value of another Asset / Data Stream pair.
Tip : This is useful if the guardrail values should be customizable by Operations.


## Properties

- **number** (`object`): Limits for absolute minimum and maximum values.
summary:

Tip : This is useful if the guardrail values should be customizable by Operations.

number.description: Limits for absolute minimum and maximum values.

source.description: Asset / Data Stream pair used to determine the values for the minimum and maximum guardrail values.

inclusive.description: The Asset / Data Stream pair value is inclusive within the allowable range.
